title: Path Stage Nav Dock
problem: The Path view was becoming more game-like, but a duplicated text tab row still sat outside the cockpit and made the stage feel like a webpage stack. The first Path screen needed less chrome and more in-world navigation.
implementation: Added renderPathStageNavDock as a compact in-board HUD with overview, map, log, trail, play, and comms controls.
Hid the duplicated Path-mode detail tab row while preserving navigation through data-detail-view buttons.
Added top stage padding and responsive sizing so the HUD does not overlap Mission Glance on desktop or mobile.
Updated docs, cache tags, and regression coverage.

verification.result: failed before integration because the cockpit nav renderer, hidden Path tab row, styles, README, and cache tags were not present

verification.command: In-app browser verification on command/path route at 1280x900 and 390x844
verification.result: Old detail tabs hidden, six-button HUD nav visible, no Mission Glance overlap, no horizontal overflow, and no page scroll at load

nextAction: Continue tightening the Path cockpit into a premium first-screen command level, then bring the same no-scroll game-stage discipline to lane minigames.
